results.title: Toronto Blue Jays vs New York Yankees: Betting Preview
results.summary: The moneyline and point spread odds align perfectly with the source data, but the game total and tie odds are missing from the provided dataset.

issues.explanation: The Sports Select proline source in the data only provides home and away odds (150 and 130) for this matchup, with no 3-way/tie option listed.

issues.claim: The total is set at 7.5 runs, with both the over and under offered at 1.80.
issues.explanation: The source data for the Saturday afternoon game (id: baea15ab-eff6-403e-a478-921a6ae2e9db) does not contain game totals or over/under prop bets.

results.title: Alouettes vs Argonauts: Montreal Gets the Edge in CFL Betting Preview
results.summary: The article correctly details the matchup and moneyline odds but contains a factual contradiction regarding the point spread odds for Toronto.

issues.claim: Toronto's +125 odds on the spread indicate they're being given a slight chance to compete
issues.explanation: The source data lists the spread odds for the Argonauts as -125, but the article incorrectly identifies them as +125, which is the opposite betting value.

results.title: Montreal Stuns Toronto in Overtime Thriller, Hamilton Edges Winnipeg
results.summary: The final scores and winners match the source data, but the betting lines and future schedule details are not supported by the provided source.

issues.claim: Montreal's win was especially surprising given the pre-game odds which had the Argonauts as +270 underdogs, with the Alouettes favored at -192.
issues.explanation: The source data contains game results only and does not include pre-game odds or betting lines to verify this claim.

issues.claim: Hamilton were favored by 2 points according to the spread line (-125 for Hamilton, -125 for Winnipeg).
issues.explanation: The source data does not contain point spreads or moneyline values.

issues.claim: clash between Montreal and Toronto scheduled for June 13th.
issues.explanation: The source data shows these two teams played on June 12th; there is no scheduling data in the source to verify a back-to-back game on June 13th.

results.title: Pirates Fall Short in Miami, Marlins Pull Off Surprise Victory
results.summary: The article incorrectly identifies the game's venue and includes betting data that cannot be verified by the source.

issues.claim: The game was played in Miami ('Pirates Fall Short in Miami').
issues.explanation: The source data lists the Pittsburgh Pirates as the home team, which indicates the game was played at their home stadium in Pittsburgh, not in Miami.

issues.claim: The Marlins were listed as +265 underdogs and the over-under was set at 8.5 runs.
issues.explanation: The provided source data contains game results but does not include betting odds or over-under lines to verify these specific claims.

results.title: CFL Preview: BC Lions at Saskatchewan Roughriders
results.summary: The article provides a game total not found in the source data and a point spread that differs slightly from the listed value.

issues.explanation: The source data lists the spread as -2, while the article claims it is -2.5.
The source data does not provide any information regarding the game total (over/under) for this matchup.

results.summary: The provided source data does not contain any information regarding a Mets vs. Cardinals matchup or any games played on June 11, 2026.

issues.claim: The New York Mets face off against the St. Louis Cardinals... at 7:10 PM ET on June 11th.
issues.explanation: No source data was available for June 11, 2026. Furthermore, the source data shows the Mets playing the Braves on June 12 and the Cardinals playing the Twins on June 13, with no recorded matchup between the Mets and Cardinals.

results.title: Mets Stun Cardinals in Upset Victory, But Odds Hint at Big Surprises Ahead
results.summary: The primary game discussed in the article (Mets vs. Cardinals) is not present in the provided source data, which begins on June 12, 2026.

issues.claim: The New York Mets delivered a stunning 5-4 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals on Wednesday night.
issues.explanation: The provided source data starts on June 12, 2026, and does not contain the results for the Wednesday (June 10, 2026) game between the Mets and the Cardinals.

issues.claim: The Mets’ win sets the stage for an intriguing matchup against the Atlanta Braves on Friday.
issues.explanation: While the source data confirms the Mets played the Braves on Friday, June 12, the final score was 7-5, not the 5-4 result described for the previous game.
